fields.description: The action_type key logged in Agent Action Log (e.g. set_room_rate, cancel_reservation, waive_fee). Wildcards not supported — one rule per action_type.
fields.label: Action Type

fields.description: Full: run immediately. Suggest: return draft only, do not apply. Approve: park in the Inbox for a human tap.
fields.label: Autonomy

fields.description: Optional. Payload key to compare against threshold_value (e.g. 'amount', 'delta_pct'). If set, this rule only fires when the operator/value condition matches; otherwise falls back to Full.
fields.label: Threshold Field
